title: Worker process gets OOM-killed after a few hours under load
body:
We run the background worker in a container with a 512MB limit. After roughly 3-4 hours of steady traffic, memory usage climbs continuously until Kubernetes OOM-kills the pod and restarts it.

Heap snapshot shows a growing number of retained `RequestContext` objects that never get released. Looks like a memory leak in the request pipeline introduced after upgrading to v2.3 -- this used to run fine for days before that release.

```
INFO  RequestContext count: 184302 (growing ~40/min)
```

This is affecting every deployment we run, not just one environment.
